stemHtml: An unidentified aircraft with no entry clearance strays into an FIR and is intercepted. The intercepting aircraft hears the phrase "AM LOST" from the intercepted aircraft. What does this mean?

options.b: The aircraft is requesting a squawk code.
options.c: The aircraft is in an emergency and needs heading guidance.
options.d: The aircraft needs to divert to the nearest aerodrome.
